text: What is the integral of x^2 * e^x dx?
If A = {1, 2, 3} and B = {2, 3, 4}, what is A ∩ B?
Explain the central limit theorem in simple terms.
A bag contains 3 red marbles and 5 blue marbles. If you draw two marbles without replacement, what is the probability both are red?
Prove that the square root of 2 is irrational.
If P implies Q and Q implies R, does P imply R? Explain your reasoning.
What is the Laplace transform of sin(at)? Use standard notation.
Calculate the mean and standard deviation of the dataset: {2, 5, 7, 10, 12}.
A train leaves station A at 60 mph. Another train leaves station B, 150 miles away, at 40 mph heading towards A. When do they meet?
A study finds that the mean test score is 78 with a standard deviation of 10. Assuming a normal distribution, what percentage of students scored above 90?
You have a 3-gallon jug and a 5-gallon jug. How can you measure exactly 4 gallons of water?
If a train leaves New York at 60 mph and another leaves Boston at 70 mph, with the cities 200 miles apart, when will they meet?
Explain the Monty Hall problem and why switching doors increases your probability of winning.
Let A = {1, 2, 3} and B = {2, 3, 4}. Find A ∪ B and A ∩ B.
Determine if the following statement is true or false: For all real numbers x, if x² > 4 then x > 2.
What is the cardinality of the power set of {a, b, c}?
